pi_items.source: Summed all 8 gig revenues from setup_task.sh: 350+280+450+320+400+180+300+380
Calculated from expenses in setup_task.sh: (PA rental $75 + Gas $40) × 8 gigs = $115 × 8
Calculated from expenses in setup_task.sh: (Rehearsal $200 + Hosting $15 + Marketing $50) × 2 months = $265 × 2
Sum of per-gig ($920) and monthly ($530) expenses: $920 + $530
Calculated as total revenue minus total expenses: $2660 - $1450
Counted 'Y' values for Alex in gig_data array in setup_task.sh: appears in gigs 1,2,3,5,6,7,8 = 7 gigs
Counted 'Y' values for Bailey in gig_data array in setup_task.sh: appears in gigs 1,2,3,4,5,7,8 = 7 gigs
Counted 'Y' values for Casey in gig_data array in setup_task.sh: appears in gigs 1,3,4,5,6,7 = 6 gigs
Counted 'Y' values for Drew in gig_data array in setup_task.sh: appears in gigs 2,3,4,6,7,8 = 6 gigs
Sum of all member gig counts: Alex (7) + Bailey (7) + Casey (6) + Drew (6) = 26 shares
Calculated as net profit divided by total shares: $1210 ÷ 26 = $46.538..., rounds to $46.54
Count of gig_data array rows in setup_task.sh

pi_items.verified_value: PA System Rental, Gas/Transportation, Rehearsal Space, Website Hosting, Marketing/Flyers

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic band profit-splitting task with 8 gigs across January-February 2024. Actual data: Total Revenue $2660 (sum of gig income 350+280+450+320+400+180+300+380). Expenses total $1450 (per-gig costs: $75 PA rental + $40 gas = $920 for 8 gigs; monthly costs: $200 rehearsal + $15 hosting + $50 marketing = $530 for 2 months). Net Profit is $1210. Member gig attendance: Alex attended 7 gigs, Bailey 7 gigs, Casey 6 gigs, Drew 6 gigs (total 26 shares, not 25 as claimed in verifier). Correct payment-per-share is $46.54 (1210÷26), not $48.40. Individual member payments: Alex $325.77, Bailey $325.77, Casey $279.23, Drew $279.23. NOTE: Verifier contains errors in expected values for Alex's gig count (claims 6, actual 7), total shares (claims 25, actual 26), and payment per share (claims $48.40, actual $46.54).
